author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Scorecard Code-Review (0→10): approved-review discipline for merged changesets

A workable review flow is decided and documented (maintainer approves agent-lane PRs via GitHub review before merge; bot reviews do not count); ruleset optionally enforces 1 approving review; Code-Review score trends toward 10 over the rolling 30-changeset window; decision recorded here

message: Scorecard found 0/16 recent changesets with an approving GitHub review — agent-lane PRs merge on green checks without a formal Approve. HUMAN-GATED process decision: requiring approvals changes the autonomous-lane merge flow (maintainer tap on every PR). The score window is rolling, so improvement is gradual by construction. Cubic/CodeRabbit/Greptile comments do NOT count — only GitHub reviews with APPROVED state.

author: maintainer-agent
message: graph: review approvals are enforced through branch-protection rules

author: codex-audit-20260715

patch.value: Establish a sustainable approved-review discipline for agent-authored changes and decide whether repository rules should enforce one human approval.
